tagline: From weekly lawn care to custom patios and stonework, we design, build, and maintain beautiful outdoor spaces.

hero.headline: Your Yard Deserves 25 Years of Expertise
hero.subheadline: Monteiro and Sons is the family-owned team MetroWest Massachusetts trusts for lawn care, custom patios, and hardscape design-build. We show up on time, stay on budget, and treat your property like our own.
checkmarks: Custom hardscape design & maintenance under one roof

services.headline: Everything Your Outdoor Space Needs
services.subtitle: From weekly mowing to custom stonework, one trusted team handles it all.

cards.title: Weekly Lawn Maintenance
cards.description: Precision mowing, edging, and blowing every week so your lawn stays neighborhood-best without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Custom Patio Design & Build
cards.description: Natural stone, pavers, or bluestone patios designed for your lifestyle and built to last decades in New England weather.

cards.title: Walkways & Retaining Walls
cards.description: Functional hardscape that solves drainage issues and adds curb appeal with expert craftsmanship.

cards.title: Seasonal Clean-Ups
cards.description: Spring and fall clean-ups including leaf removal, bed prep, and pruning to keep your property pristine year-round.

cards.title: Outdoor Fire Pits & Living Spaces
cards.description: Custom fire pits, seating walls, and outdoor kitchens that turn your backyard into an entertainment destination.

cards.title: Planting & Garden Design
cards.description: Curated plantings, mulching, and garden beds designed for color, texture, and low-maintenance beauty across all seasons.

how_it_works.headline: Three Simple Steps to Your Dream Yard

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We will visit your property, listen to your vision, and provide an honest quote with no surprises.

steps.title: We Design & Schedule Your Project
steps.description: Our team creates a custom plan tailored to your property, timeline, and budget. You approve before any work begins.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Transformed Outdoor Space
steps.description: We handle every detail from start to finish, leaving you with a yard that increases your home value and makes neighbors jealous.

about.label: Family-Owned Since Day One
about.headline: 25+ Years of Honest, Quality Work in MetroWest
about.description: Monteiro and Sons started as a father-and-son dream and grew into MetroWest Massachusetts' most trusted landscaping team. We are BBB Accredited, ranked in the top 1% of Framingham landscapers, and still answer every call personally. Our word is our bond: we show up when we say we will, finish on budget, and never cut corners.

features.title: Family-Owned Accountability
features.description: Every project is personally overseen by the Monteiro family. Your satisfaction is our reputation.

features.title: Maintenance & Builds Under One Roof
features.description: Weekly lawn care and custom hardscape design-build from the same trusted team. No juggling contractors.

features.title: Honest Communication Always
features.description: From your first estimate to the final walkthrough, we tell you exactly what to expect — no surprises, no upsells.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every project starts with a free on-site estimate. You will know exactly what you are paying for before we begin.

guarantee.headline: Our On-Time, On-Budget Promise
guarantee.description: We guarantee we will show up on the scheduled day and complete your project within the quoted price. If we miss a scheduled maintenance visit, your next service is on us. For hardscape projects, if our final invoice exceeds the approved quote, we cover the difference. That is how a family business earns trust for 25 years.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Massachusetts?
faqs.answer: We serve Framingham, Natick, Needham, Newton, Sherborn, Sudbury, Wellesley, Weston, Dover, and surrounding MetroWest Massachusetts towns within about 20 miles of our Framingham base.

faqs.question: Do you offer both one-time projects and ongoing maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. We handle everything from weekly lawn mowing contracts to one-time custom patio builds. Many clients start with maintenance and later hire us for hardscape projects because they trust our work.

faqs.question: How long does a typical patio or hardscape project take?
faqs.answer: Most residential patio projects take 3-7 days depending on size and complexity. We provide a detailed timeline during your free estimate so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are fully insured, BBB Accredited since 2015, and have earned a 95%+ quality score ranking us in the top 1% of Framingham landscapers.

faqs.question: What happens if weather delays my project?
faqs.answer: We communicate proactively about weather delays and reschedule as quickly as possible. Our on-time guarantee accounts for contractor-controlled delays, not acts of nature, and we always keep you informed.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: Doug and his team exceeded our expectations. His talent and training in design, his commitment to doing a good job and pleasing the customer, and his enthusiasm for his work truly make a difference.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: They have been consistently excellent with our weekly lawn care for more than two years, and exceeded expectations on major landscaping projects with high-quality workmanship and outstanding attention to detail.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Client
testimonials.text: Great communication, great service, and friendliness while being respectful of our wishes and property. They gave great ideas and a fair price, were prompt, and went above and beyond.

contact.headline: Ready to Transform Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from the family team MetroWest trusts most.

footer.description: Monteiro and Sons is a family-owned landscaping and hardscaping company serving MetroWest Massachusetts for over 25 years. We design, build, and maintain beautiful outdoor spaces with honesty and craftsmanship.
footer.service_area: Serving Framingham, Natick, Needham, Newton, Sherborn, Sudbury, Wellesley, Weston, Dover & surrounding towns
